mapper.select: SELECT o.id, o.user_id, o.doctor_id, o.schedule_id, o.source_id, o.dept_name, o.work_date, o.work_time, o.order_status, o.create_time, o.update_time, d.doctor_name, d.title, d.specialty, d.avatar, u.nick_name as patient_name, u.username as patient_username FROM hos_appointment_order o LEFT JOIN hos_doctor d ON o.doctor_id = d.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON o.user_id = u.id WHERE o.id = #{id} AND o.deleted = 0
SELECT dept_name as name, COUNT(*) as value FROM hos_appointment_order WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY dept_name ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT d.doctor_name as name, COUNT(*) as value FROM hos_appointment_order o LEFT JOIN hos_doctor d ON o.doctor_id = d.id WHERE o.deleted = 0 GROUP BY o.doctor_id ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 10
